ocr.text: In the Power Purchase Agreement Metrics for March 2025, the data reveals a P/E Ratio ranging from 1.4 to 2.0, with
corresponding Current Ratios of 0.6 to 1.8, Debt/Equity ratios from 0.6 to 0.9, Gross Margins between 35% and 40%, Operating
Margins from 18% to 23%, Net Profit Margins from 9% to 12%, and ROE values varying from 6% to 17%, while ROA
fluctuates between 7% and 9%. In the Green Hydrogen Costs table, production costs in SGD start with 5M for 2023, decreasing
to 3M by 2027, while CapEx exhibits values of 15M in 2024 and continues to decline to 2M by 2026, with OpEx values of 12M
in 2024 and decreasing to 1M by 2027; the total costs reflect a downward trend from SGD 30M to SGD 2M.
PowerPurchaseAgreementMetrics  March2025
P/ERatio  FinancialRatios  MarketIndices
CurrentRatio  Debt/Equity  GrossMargin  OperatingMargin  NetProfitMargin  ROE  ROA
The revenue figures show a growth from 20M in 2023 to 5M in 2027, with net income diminishing from 10M to 1M over the
same period.

85%  80%  75%  70%  30M  40M  50M  60M  70M  SGD5M  SGD4M  SGD3M  SGD2M  Total
Production volume is projected to drop from 4M to 1.5M kg, while sales volume reduces from 3M to 1M kg. The growth rate is
noted at 10%, market share at 15%, electrolyzer efficiency at 85%, renewable energy mix at 80%, government incentives at
SGD 5M, and R&D expenses at SGD 4M, culminating in total revenue of SGD 30M.
